pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py strictly require a Wazuh CDB list containing at least 10 CVE IDs.
setup_task.sh downloads the CISA KEV catalog to this specific path.
export_result.sh checks for the integration report at this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies entirely on real data downloaded dynamically from the CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities Catalog (JSON format) and placed at /tmp/cisa_kev.json, with no synthetic fallback. The verifier checks that a new CDB list with at least 10 CVE entries is created, a Wazuh detection rule referencing it is added, the vulnerability detection module is enabled, and an integration report of at least 600 characters is written to /home/ga/Desktop/kev_integration_report.txt.
